## What & why

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:mcp` passes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If store specs/limits changed, cited the current Apple/Google/Expo doc
- [ ] No content duplicated per agent; `docs/store-specs.md` stays the source of truth
